subject: MATHEMATICS
title: describe and compare outcomes in real-life situations
objective: describe and compare outcomes in real-life situations using the following terms: equally
introduction: Numbers and shapes are like puzzle pieces — they fit together to create amazing things! 🧩 Today: describe and compare outcomes in real-life. Let's explore how math helps us understand the world.

vocabulary.definition: The study of numbers, shapes, and patterns.
